---
title: "Epidemics over Observed Networks"
description: "Uses observed dynamic network census data directly in simulation rather than ERGM estimation, with custom initialization and infection modules."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2018-08-01"
categories: [SI, observed networks, census data, intermediate]
order: 11
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
